sections.paragraph:
Original: צופח

Transliteration: tsôphach

Phonetic: tso-fakh'

BDB Definition:

Zophah = "a cruse"
  1. an Asherite, son of Helem and father of Suah, Harnepher, Shual, Beri, and Imrah

Origin: from an unused root meaning to expand, breadth

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
